---
title: "Group Project"
author: "Your NAME goes here"
execute: 
  echo: false
  eval: true
number-sections: true
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)    # Data wrangling 
library(ggplot2)      # Data visualization
library(performance)  # Model assessment
library(skimr)        # Exploratory analysis
library(sjPlot)       # Plot and tables for linear models
library(kableExtra)   # Formatting html table

# Read the Data using the following line of code:

report_data <- read.csv(url("https://github.com/DA-STATS3011-STATS4052/DA-course_materials/raw/main/docs/data_sets/PGALPGA2008.csv"))

```

# Introduction {#sec-intro}

# Exploratory Analysis {#sec-EA}

# Formal Analysis {#sec-FA}

# Conclusions {#sec-con}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Further Questions {#sec-further}

## Part 1

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| tidy: true

# Data has been pre-loaded
q2_data <- read.csv(url('https://github.com/DA-STATS3011-STATS4052/DA-course_materials/raw/main/docs/data_sets/test1.csv'))
# Code for further Question 1 part 1

```

## Part 2

```{r}
#| echo: true
# Code for further Question 1 part 2

```
